headline: KeyBanc Turns Bullish on LyondellBasell (LYB), Sets $73 Target amid Commodity Tailwinds
summary: LyondellBasell Industries N.V. (NYSE:LYB) is included among the 15 Best High Dividend Stocks to Invest in Under $100.
